use_cases.name: Enterprise Knowledge Assistant
use_cases.executive_summary: A retrieval-grounded assistant over internal documents so staff find answers without hunting across systems.
use_cases.why_now: Retrieval-grounded assistants are a low-risk, high-frequency starting point.
use_cases.first_step: Pick one document corpus with a clear owner and known pain.

use_cases.name: Technical Standards & Compliance Assistant
use_cases.executive_summary: A grounded assistant over standards, policies, and regulations that cites the exact clause behind every answer.
use_cases.why_now: High-stakes lookups are slow and error-prone today; grounded citation makes them auditable.
use_cases.first_step: Choose one regulated domain with a maintained document set.

use_cases.name: Field/Operations Troubleshooting Copilot
use_cases.executive_summary: A read-only copilot that helps frontline staff resolve common issues using manuals, SOPs, and historical cases.
use_cases.why_now: High-frequency operational need with a clear value path and human oversight.
use_cases.first_step: Scope one workflow where SOPs and case history already exist.

use_cases.name: Work-Order Drafting Agent
use_cases.executive_summary: An assistant that drafts and routes work orders from natural-language requests, with human approval before submission.
use_cases.why_now: Manual work-order creation is repetitive and slow; drafting keeps a human in the loop.
use_cases.first_step: Pick one work-order type with a stable template and clear approver.

use_cases.name: Invoice & Procurement Exception Handler
use_cases.executive_summary: Automate triage of invoice and procurement exceptions, escalating only the cases that need a human.
use_cases.why_now: Exception queues are costly and well-bounded — a strong automation starting point.
use_cases.first_step: Sample one month of exceptions and label the top recurring causes.

use_cases.name: Document Review Workflow
use_cases.executive_summary: Pre-screen contracts and documents against a checklist, flagging risks for reviewer attention.
use_cases.why_now: Review backlogs are common; pre-screening focuses scarce expert time.
use_cases.first_step: Define a checklist for one high-volume document type.

use_cases.name: Analytics Copilot
use_cases.executive_summary: A copilot that explains dashboards, variances, and anomalies in plain language.
use_cases.why_now: Pairs well with existing BI and lowers the bar to self-serve insight.
use_cases.first_step: Target one well-governed dataset with reliable definitions.

use_cases.name: Production / Cost Variance Explainer
use_cases.executive_summary: Explain production or cost variances against plan, surfacing likely drivers with supporting figures.
use_cases.why_now: Variance analysis is recurring, high-value, and currently manual.
use_cases.first_step: Pick one recurring variance report with trusted inputs.

use_cases.name: Document & Reporting Summarizer
use_cases.executive_summary: Turn long reports, filings, and meeting notes into concise, reviewable summaries.
use_cases.why_now: Summarization is mature, easy to evaluate, and broadly useful.
use_cases.first_step: Choose one recurring report type and define a good-summary rubric.

use_cases.name: Executive Report Generator
use_cases.executive_summary: Assemble first-draft executive and board reports from approved data sources and prior narratives.
use_cases.why_now: Recurring report assembly is time-consuming and templatable.
use_cases.first_step: Pick one recurring report with a stable structure and data feed.

use_cases.name: Predictive Maintenance Assistant
use_cases.executive_summary: Surface early failure signals and recommended actions from equipment and sensor history.
use_cases.why_now: Unplanned downtime is expensive; even modest lead time pays back fast.
use_cases.first_step: Select one asset class with sufficient sensor and failure history.

use_cases.name: Drilling / Process Optimization Advisor
use_cases.executive_summary: Recommend parameter adjustments from historical operations data to improve technical outcomes.
use_cases.why_now: Small efficiency gains compound across high-value technical operations.
use_cases.first_step: Frame one bounded optimization with clear, measurable outcomes.

use_cases.name: IT Service Desk Copilot
use_cases.executive_summary: Resolve common IT requests and draft responses from the knowledge base, escalating edge cases.
use_cases.why_now: Ticket deflection is measurable and the knowledge base already exists.
use_cases.first_step: Pick the top 20 recurring ticket types and their canonical answers.

use_cases.name: HR Policy & Onboarding Assistant
use_cases.executive_summary: Answer HR policy and onboarding questions from approved documents, with citations.
use_cases.why_now: Repetitive policy questions are a low-risk, high-frequency win.
use_cases.first_step: Start with the onboarding and benefits policy set.
